content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt (en-US) says "public beta! We're still testing… expect rough edges", implying an unfinished build.
Pierre: Guideline 2.2 forbids submitting betas or trials to the App Store, and reviewers routinely reject builds whose store copy admits the app is still in testing. Your en-US release notes explicitly call this a "public beta" with "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2). Rewrite the release notes to describe the finished features (e.g. "New: sync your tasks across devices") and keep beta language on TestFlight only.
